description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style filing cabinet with a weathered, rust-stained metal exterior. The surface is mottled with patches of brown, tan, and reddish discoloration, suggesting prolonged exposure to harsh environments. One side prominently displays a red octagonal warning sign reading 'WARNING PESTICIDES: FIRE WILL CAUSE TOXIC FUMES' with a skull and crossbones, indicating hazardous contents or use in a regulated area. The cabinet lacks visible handles or label holders, and the drawers are not distinctly outlined, giving it a monolithic appearance. The overall build is robust, likely constructed from heavy-gauge steel, and designed for secure storage. Its utilitarian look and warning signage suggest placement in an industrial, warehouse, or garage setting.
description: A weathered, rust-stained metal filing cabinet with a prominent pesticide warning sign and no visible handles or label holders. Its industrial appearance suggests use in hazardous or regulated environments.
description_view_0: A rust-stained metal side with mottled tan and brown textures, no visible handles or signage.
description_view_1: Another weathered metal side, showing more pronounced white and orange corrosion patterns.
description_view_2: The front face features a large red pesticide warning sign with a skull and crossbones, set against a stained metal background.
description_view_3: A side with heavy rust and reddish stains, lacking any signage or interactive features.
